purpose: Post worker-local GBM scratch-buffer sanity check on the same real atlas that exposed the 40k->80k GRN cliff. This is not the full cliff rerun.
tfs: first 50 bundled human TFs, after expression-matrix resolution
interpretation: The scratch-buffer patch improves the same real microglia atlas through 20k cells and restores near-linear behavior over 5k->20k. It does not prove the 40k->80k cliff is fixed; rerun 40k, 80k, and 91,838 before making atlas-scale GRN claims.
